title: Fried Venezuelan Bread
description: A comforting, whole30-friendly fried bread recipe from Venezuela, made with instant yeast and binchotan charcoal.

ingredients.name: all-purpose flour
ingredients.notes: make sure gluten-free if you need to

ingredients.name: binchotan charcoal powder
ingredients.notes: adjust to your liking for smokiness

instructions: Combine flour, yeast, and salt in a bowl. Mix well until combined.
Gradually add water to the flour mixture and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until smooth.
Place the dough in a greased bowl and let it rise for 1 hour.
Heat binchotan charcoal powder with coconut oil in a pan over medium heat.
Divide the dough into 4-6 equal pieces and shape each into a ball.
Roll out each ball into a thin circle.
Fry the bread in the pan with coconut oil for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Drain on paper towels and serve hot.
Serve with your favorite toppings, such as cheese, meats, or vegetables.
Serve warm and enjoy the crispy, chewy texture of this delicious Venezuelan bread!
Fry in batches if necessary to prevent overcrowding the pan.
